author: mark
text:
ready: add --limit N to cap the queue

Agents try bl ready --limit N carrying the habit from other tools
and hit a parser error. --limit truncates before rendering: text
mode appends "... and K more" when the queue is longer, JSON emits
at most N entries. 0 is rejected explicitly; negatives are rejected
by clap's usize parser. SKILL.md table updated.
